name: Zucchini Fiesta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut zucchini and squash crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
2. Cut onions in half crosswise.
3. Cut avocado into 3/4-inch cubes.
4. Steam zucchini and crookneck squash over boiling water until crisp-tender (about 3 minutes). Plunge into ice water to cool; drain well.
5. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, oil, salt, ground cumin, green onions, diced green chilies, pimento-stuffed olives, and cream cheese.
6. Add drained squash to the bowl and stir lightly. Chill for 30 minutes.
7. Peel and pit the avocado; add it to the salad and mix lightly.
8. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on four salad plates. Mound equal portions of salad on each plate. Garnish each salad with a sprig of coriander.
